description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a quilted, diamond-patterned white top surface and a black side panel featuring a subtle wavy texture. The mattress appears to be of medium thickness, likely suitable for a double or queen-sized bed. The side panels are accented with two vertical light gray handles or straps on each long side, which are likely intended for lifting or rotating the mattress. The top surface is smooth and padded, suggesting a soft, comfortable feel, while the sides are reinforced for durability. There is no visible branding or manufacturer label on any side. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and well-constructed, with continuous edge piping providing a finished look.
description: A clean, modern mattress with a quilted white top, black wavy side panels, and light gray handles. The design features continuous edge piping and a soft, padded surface.
description_view_0: The mattress is viewed from the short end, showing the quilted white top and black side panel with no visible handles.
description_view_1: The mattress is viewed from the long side, displaying two light gray handles on the black wavy side panel and the quilted white top.
description_view_2: The opposite short end of the mattress, similar to view 0, with the quilted white top and black side panel, no handles visible.
description_view_3: The opposite long side, again showing two light gray handles on the black wavy side panel and the quilted white top.
attribute_pattern_design: Quilted diamond pattern on the top surface, with a subtle wavy texture on the black side panels.
attribute_edge_piping: Continuous edge piping in light gray, running around the entire perimeter of the mattress, moderately thick and visually distinct.
